name: Grandma's Current Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse currants in hot water, drain and dry on a towel.
2. Cream the butter until fluffy. Add sugar and spice mixture, then cream thoroughly.
3. Beat egg yolks until thick and creamy. Add to the butter mixture and blend well.
4. Gradually add half of the sifted flour, mixing until smooth.
5. Add the remaining flour, mixing until smooth again.
6. Mix in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
7. Pour the batter into 2 lined loaf pans (9" x 4" x 2.5") and bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 25 minutes.
8. Test for doneness by inserting a toothpick in the center.
